greeting.title: Hi there! 👋
greeting.subtitle: How can we help you today?
greeting.botWelcome: Hi! How can I help you today? Feel free to ask anything or check the Help section for FAQs.

faqs.a: Open the Files app and either drag files into the browser window or click the + button and select "Upload file".

faqs.q: How do I share a file?
faqs.a: Select a file, click the share icon, and enter a username or email. You can also create public share links!

faqs.q: How do I recover deleted files?
faqs.a: Deleted files are moved to the Trash. Go to "Deleted files" in the Files app to restore them within 30 days.

faqs.q: How do I change my password?
faqs.a: Go to Settings > Security. You can change your password and enable two-factor authentication there.

faqs.q: How do I add external storage?
faqs.a: Go to Settings > Administration > External storage. You can connect services like FTP, S3, Google Drive, and more.

faqs.q: How do I search for files?
faqs.a: Use the search icon in the top header bar to search for files, contacts, and more across your cloud.

responses.reply: Hello! Welcome to Scale Infinite. How can I assist you today?
You're welcome! Let me know if there's anything else I can help with.
I can help with uploading, sharing, deleting files, security settings, storage, and more. Just ask!
Goodbye! Have a great day. I'm always here if you need help.

fallback: I'm not sure about that. Try asking about uploads, sharing, storage, or security — or check the Help section for common questions!
